detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Cheddurai._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Cheddurai.sol#441-503):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Cheddurai.sol#485)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Cheddurai.sol#517-529)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Cheddurai.sol#491)
		- _feeAddrWallet2.transfer(amount) (Cheddurai.sol#537)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Cheddurai.sol#501)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Cheddurai.sol#623)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Cheddurai.sol#603)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Cheddurai.sol#605)
	Cheddurai._rOwned (Cheddurai.sol#231) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Cheddurai._takeTeam(uint256) (Cheddurai.sol#617-625)
	- Cheddurai._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Cheddurai.sol#599-613)
	- Cheddurai.balanceOf(address) (Cheddurai.sol#359-363)
	- Cheddurai.constructor() (Cheddurai.sol#301-323)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Cheddurai.sol#501)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Cheddurai.sol#631)
	Cheddurai._rTotal (Cheddurai.sol#247) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Cheddurai._getCurrentSupply() (Cheddurai.sol#755-765)
	- Cheddurai._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Cheddurai.sol#629-635)
	- Cheddurai.constructor() (Cheddurai.sol#301-323)
	- Cheddurai.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Cheddurai.sol#415-423)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Cheddurai._transfer(address,address,uint256)](Cheddurai.sol#L441-L503):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](Cheddurai.sol#L485)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](Cheddurai.sol#L517-L529)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](Cheddurai.sol#L491)
		- [_feeAddrWallet2.transfer(amount)](Cheddurai.sol#L537)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount)](Cheddurai.sol#L501)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](Cheddurai.sol#L623)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](Cheddurai.sol#L603)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](Cheddurai.sol#L605)
	[Cheddurai._rOwned](Cheddurai.sol#L231) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Cheddurai._takeTeam(uint256)](Cheddurai.sol#L617-L625)
	- [Cheddurai._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](Cheddurai.sol#L599-L613)
	- [Cheddurai.balanceOf(address)](Cheddurai.sol#L359-L363)
	- [Cheddurai.constructor()](Cheddurai.sol#L301-L323)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount)](Cheddurai.sol#L501)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Cheddurai.sol#L631)
	[Cheddurai._rTotal](Cheddurai.sol#L247) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Cheddurai._getCurrentSupply()](Cheddurai.sol#L755-L765)
	- [Cheddurai._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](Cheddurai.sol#L629-L635)
	- [Cheddurai.constructor()](Cheddurai.sol#L301-L323)
	- [Cheddurai.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](Cheddurai.sol#L415-L423)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Cheddurai.openTrading() (Cheddurai.sol#543-567):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (Cheddurai.sol#553)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Cheddurai.sol#555)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Cheddurai.sol#555)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (Cheddurai.sol#563)
	Cheddurai.tradingOpen (Cheddurai.sol#279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Cheddurai.openTrading() (Cheddurai.sol#543-567)
